'''pasanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamoration|enamoration]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamoration|enamoration]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pasanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæsængæth|pæsængæth]] || [[word:pæsængæj|pæsængæj]] || [[word:pæsængæsh|pæsængæsh]] || [[word:pæsængæ|pæsængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pasasangath|pasasangath]] || [[word:pasasangaj|pasasangaj]] || [[word:pasasangash|pasasangash]] || [[word:pasasanga|pasasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pasangath|pasangath]] || [[word:pasangaj|pasangaj]] || [[word:pasangash|pasangash]] || [[word:pasanga|pasanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pasafngath|pasafngath]] || [[word:pasafngaj|pasafngaj]] || [[word:pasafngash|pasafngash]] || [[word:pasafngaf|pasafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pasangatha|pasangatha]] || [[word:pasangaja|pasangaja]] || [[word:pasangasha|pasangasha]] || [[word:pasangaka|pasangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pasangath|pasangath]] || [[word:pasangaj|pasangaj]] || [[word:pasangash|pasangash]] || [[word:pasanga|pasanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pasangathal|pasangathal]] || [[word:pasangajal|pasangajal]] || [[word:pasangashal|pasangashal]] || [[word:pasangakal|pasangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pasangathatha|pasangathatha]] || [[word:pasangajaja|pasangajaja]] || [[word:pasangashasha|pasangashasha]] || [[word:pasangaka|pasangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pasangathan|pasangathan]] || [[word:pasangajan|pasangajan]] || [[word:pasangashan|pasangashan]] || [[word:pasangakan|pasangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pasangathaoro|pasangathaoro]] || [[word:pasangajaoro|pasangajaoro]] || [[word:pasangashaoro|pasangashaoro]] || [[word:pasangakaoro|pasangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
